beIN SPORTS 2.desc_ar: Barcelona have won both of their previous home games against Newcastle United in the UEFA Champions League, beating them 1-0 in November 1997 and 3-1 in December 2002. Newcastle have lost five of their six away games against Spanish sides in all competitions, with this their first since a 2-1 loss at Deportivo de La Coruña in the 2005 UEFA Intertoto Cup. The only exception in this run was a 3-0 win at Mallorca in the 2003-04 UEFA Cup.

Newcastle have lost five of their six away games against Spanish sides in all competitions, with this their first since a 2-1 loss at Deportivo de La Coruña in the 2005 UEFA Intertoto Cup. The only exception in this run was a 3-0 win at Mallorca in the 2003-04 UEFA Cup.

beIN SPORTS EN 1.desc_ar: Tottenham have won just three of their 16 meetings with Spanish sides in all European competition. The first of those was against Atlético Madrid, beating them 5-1 in the 1963 UEFA Cup Winners Cup final. Having lost just one of their first six UEFA Champions League away games against English sides, Atlético Madrid have now lost five of their last six visits to England. However, all three of their away wins against Premier League teams in the competition have come in the knockout stages.

beIN SPORTS 1.desc_ar: Barcelona have won both of their previous home games against Newcastle United in the UEFA Champions League, beating them 1-0 in November 1997 and 3-1 in December 2002. Newcastle have lost five of their six away games against Spanish sides in all competitions, with this their first since a 2-1 loss at Deportivo de La Coruña in the 2005 UEFA Intertoto Cup. The only exception in this run was a 3-0 win at Mallorca in the 2003-04 UEFA Cup.

beIN SPORTS 1.desc_ar: Bayern Munich lost 2-1 at home to Internazionale in last season’s UEFA Champions League quarter-final – only once have they lost consecutive home games against Italian sides in the competition, doing so in October 2002/November 2004 against Milan and Juventus. Atalanta have lost just two of their seven away games against German teams in all competitions, with both defeats coming at Borussia Dortmund. This is their first ever visit to Bayern Munich.

beIN SPORTS 1.title_fr: Tottenham Hotspur vs Atlético de Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - 8es de finale - Retour
beIN SPORTS 1.desc_ar: Tottenham have won just three of their 16 meetings with Spanish sides in all European competition. The first of those was against Atlético Madrid, beating them 5-1 in the 1963 UEFA Cup Winners Cup final. Having lost just one of their first six UEFA Champions League away games against English sides, Atlético Madrid have now lost five of their last six visits to England. However, all three of their away wins against Premier League teams in the competition have come in the knockout stages.

beIN SPORTS 1.title_fr: Arsenal vs Bayer Leverkusen - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - 8es de finale - Retour
beIN SPORTS 1.desc_ar: Arsenal remain unbeaten against Bayer Leverkusen in the UEFA Champions League, with their one victory over them coming on the only occasion they have hosted the German side: 4-1 at Highbury in February 2002. When avoiding defeat away from home in the first leg, Arsenal have progressed from 17 of their 20 two-legged knockout stage ties in major European competition. The latest of those eliminations did come under Mikel Arteta, however, losing on penalties to Sporting CP in the UEFA Europa League round of 16 in 2022-23.

When avoiding defeat away from home in the first leg, Arsenal have progressed from 17 of their 20 two-legged knockout stage ties in major European competition. The latest of those eliminations did come under Mikel Arteta, however, losing on penalties to Sporting CP in the UEFA Europa League round of 16 in 2022-23.

beIN SPORTS 1.desc_ar: Barcelona have won both of their previous home games against Newcastle United in the UEFA Champions League, beating them 1-0 in November 1997 and 3-1 in December 2002. Newcastle have lost five of their six away games against Spanish sides in all competitions, with this their first since a 2-1 loss at Deportivo de La Coruña in the 2005 UEFA Intertoto Cup. The only exception in this run was a 3-0 win at Mallorca in the 2003-04 UEFA Cup.

beIN SPORTS 3.desc_ar: Tottenham have won just three of their 16 meetings with Spanish sides in all European competition. The first of those was against Atlético Madrid, beating them 5-1 in the 1963 UEFA Cup Winners Cup final. Having lost just one of their first six UEFA Champions League away games against English sides, Atlético Madrid have now lost five of their last six visits to England. However, all three of their away wins against Premier League teams in the competition have come in the knockout stages.

beIN SPORTS 3.desc_ar: FC Midtjylland have won both of their two meetings with Nottingham Forest, both in this season’s UEFA Europa League – they could beat the same side three times in major European competition for the first time. beIN SPORTS 4.desc_ar: Bayern Munich lost 2-1 at home to Internazionale in last season’s UEFA Champions League quarter-final – only once have they lost consecutive home games against Italian sides in the competition, doing so in October 2002/November 2004 against Milan and Juventus. beIN SPORTS 4.desc_ar: Bayern Munich lost 2-1 at home to Internazionale in last season’s UEFA Champions League quarter-final – only once have they lost consecutive home games against Italian sides in the competition, doing so in October 2002/November 2004 against Milan and Juventus. Atalanta have lost just two of their seven away games against German teams in all competitions, with both defeats coming at Borussia Dortmund. This is their first ever visit to Bayern Munich.

beIN SPORTS 4.desc_ar: Real Betis have lost just twice in nine UEFA Europa League games this season, but both have come against Greek opposition: PAOK Salonika in the league phase and Panathinaikos in the first leg of this tie. Despite victory in the first leg of this tie, Panathinaikos have won only five of their 28 games in major European competition against Spanish opposition  – each victory has come against a different team: Mallorca, Barcelona, Sevilla, Villarreal and Real Betis.

beIN SPORTS.desc_ar: The Qatari League is the official football league in Qatar. The league includes 12 teams. The most famous participating clubs are Al-Sadd, the champions of the last season; Al-Rayyan and Al-Arabi, the popular teams, Al-Duhail and Al-Gharafa, serious contenders for the title every season. The Qatari league includes star names such as Firmino, Verratti, and Qatari Akram Afif, the best player in Asia.

beIN SPORTS.desc_ar: Dive into the excitement of French handball with Liqui Moly Starligue, formerly LNH Division 1. Established in 1952, this premier league event features 16 top teams battling for glory. With Montpellier’s  14 Handball titles and Paris Saint-Germain's 11 wins, the competition is fierce. Champions earn spots in the EHF Champions League, while cup winners qualify for the European League.
